description: UEFN Toolbelt Plugin Registry — core tools and community plugins.

plugins.name: Material Master
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: 17 material presets (chrome, neon, hologram, lava, ice, and more). Gradient painter, team color split, pattern painter, glow pulse preview, color harmony, and bulk swap across selection or entire level.

plugins.name: Arena Generator
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Procedural symmetrical arena builder with team color auto-split. Generates small/medium/large competitive layouts in one command.

plugins.name: Prop Patterns
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: 8 procedural placement patterns: grid, circle, arc, spiral, line, wave, helix, and radial rows. One command to place any asset in any geometric arrangement.

plugins.name: MCP Bridge
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: HTTP listener inside UEFN that lets Claude Code and external scripts control the editor in real time. Adapted from the UEFN MCP Server concept by Kirch (@KirchCreator).

plugins.name: Verse Device Graph
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Scans and visualizes all Verse/Creative device connections in the level. Exports a dependency graph for documentation and debugging. Inspired by ImmatureGamer's device graph concept.

plugins.name: Verse Snippet Generator
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Generates Verse boilerplate from your live level: game manager skeleton, device declarations, elimination handlers, scoring trackers, prop spawners, and patrol AI from splines.

plugins.name: Level Snapshot
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Save, restore, diff, and compare actor transforms as named JSON snapshots. Full undo safety for destructive layout experiments.

plugins.name: Reference Auditor
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Full project health audit: orphaned assets, stale redirectors, duplicate names, unused textures. Dry-run safe — preview before delete.

plugins.name: Memory Profiler
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Scans textures and meshes for budget violations. Ranks top offenders by memory cost, flags oversized textures and high-poly meshes, auto-generates missing LODs.

plugins.name: API Explorer
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Live fuzzy search, full signature inspection, and .pyi stub generation for the UEFN Python API. Exports unreal.pyi for IDE autocomplete.
